description: Detects implicit truthiness checks on `.length` in JavaScript conditions (e.g., `if (arr.length)` instead of `if (arr.length > 0)`). Simplified from Rust: flags all member_expression nodes with `length` property regardless of whether they appear in a condition context (if/while/ternary).

flag.message: `.length` member access detected -- if used as a bare condition, prefer explicit comparison like `.length > 0`
